---
title: "Analytics and Big Data"
subtitle: "Regression II"
section_label: "Structured Data"
session: "Session 5"
date: "2026-04-14"
---

# Learning objectives {data-state="hide-menubar"}


- A
- B
- C


# TODO {data-stack-name="TODO"}

Logistic regression (illustrating the transition from regression to ML; also: fit, train/test?)
